topIssues: Frame 4: This frame is an exact duplicate of Frame 3, creating 1030ms of frozen 'dead air' with no visual or state changes.
Frame 7 & 8: These frames are completely identical to Frame 6, resulting in over 5.2 seconds of redundant static display at the end of the animation.
Frame 2: The low-contrast gray text in the 'Room trace' log at the bottom is difficult to read against the dark background, especially the technical identifiers like 'r_rev__variance'.
fixSuggestions: Deduplicate the GIF by removing Frame 4 entirely to make the transition from locking to value-writing feel snappy.
Consolidate Frames 6, 7, and 8 into a single final frame with a duration of 3000ms to reduce file size and prevent the viewer from waiting through unnecessary duplicate frames.
Increase the font contrast/brightness for the log events in the bottom 'Room trace' panel to improve readability of the agent's step-by-step actions.
